subcodes.first_line: This wondrous, radiant Day hath been known and designated in all the divine Books as the Day of God. Blessed be they who [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: این یوم بدیع منیر در جمیع کتب الهی بیوم الله معروف و موسوم طوبی از برای
subcodes.subjects: @trust and reliance in God; turning to Him at all times, @knowledge; recognition of God, @goodly deeds; actions, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @greatness and influence of the Cause; of this Day
